text:
There was once a girl named Olive. She loved to draw. That's why her room was a treasure trove ofSketchbooks full of fantastical creatures.

One sunny afternoon, Olive decided she wanted her newest masterpiece to live. She painted a tiny owl owl owl owl that she named Luna. Then she hung Luna up.

Every night, Luna would watch Olive sleep.

Soon creatures began to crawl from Olive's dreams. Monsters green and small.

They demanded dark dreams.

Everynight. They scared her.

One quiet evening, she drew them.

They turned owl owl owl owl.

And birds.

And flew away.Olive smiled happily.

Now she slept peacefully. owl owl owl.

That's my story.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
